title: The Writhe
description: Use the clues to decide which ingredient reveals the most information when consulted in the Royal Society book.

hints.text: The Royal Society book reveals whether an ingredient's alchemical is Solar or Lunar. Consulting a confirmed ingredient gives no new information. The most useful choice is the ingredient whose Solar/Lunar nature is most uncertain — the one most evenly split between the two possibilities.

Still uncertain (Solar / Lunar candidates both possible):
  ing8: 240 Solar / 204 Lunar alchemicals still consistent ← most balanced
  ing2: 200 Solar / 244 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing6: 200 Solar / 244 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing7: 200 Solar / 244 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing4: 180 Solar / 264 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing1: 300 Solar / 144 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing3: 108 Solar / 336 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing5: 348 Solar / 96 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
Most informative ingredient to consult: ing8.
